text.title: Benefits Realization Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (baseline_measurable, owner_is_business_stakeholder, attribution_required) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Baseline metric values measurable before launch?

branch.question: Business stakeholder available as owner (not PM)?

conclusion.verdict: apply full register WITH attribution plan
defer benefits realization until business owner identified
track learning milestones instead of benefits

text.example: baseline_measurable=true → business_owner_available=true → attribution_contested=true → apply full register with diff-in-diff plan (rule attribution-pre-registered).
